title: Given In Marriage Unto Thee,
content:
Given in marriage unto thee,
    Oh, thou celestial host!
    Bride of the Father and the Son,
    Bride of the Holy Ghost!

    Other betrothal shall dissolve,
    Wedlock of will decay;
    Only the keeper of this seal
    Conquers mortality.
meaning:
"Given In Marriage Unto Thee," is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
